bug_report.summary: Unexpected visual change in tab strip (tab label/close button) while on about:config
steps_to_reproduce: Enter edit mode for a preference (e.g., browser.newtabpage.activity-stream.default.sites).
expected_behaviors: Browser tab strip appearance (tab label area and close button) should remain consistent with the previous build.
actual_behaviors: Tab strip rendering differs in the tab label/close button region (pixel-level styling/appearance change) compared to the previous build. (Diff regions: bbox [51,61,231,85] and [243,65,260,81]).
